title: IngestFileEvent
description: Per-file NDJSON line emitted by `sqlite-graphrag ingest` on stdout. One line per input file, followed by a single IngestSummary line.

file.description: Filesystem path of the ingested file.

status.description: Outcome: indexed (created successfully), skipped (duplicate name or invalid derivation), failed (processing or persistence error).

truncated.description: True when the derived name was truncated to fit the 60-character limit.

original_name.description: Original derived name before truncation. Present only when truncated is true.

original_filename.description: Original file basename before kebab-case normalization. Always present.

error.description: Error or skip reason. Present when status is skipped or failed.

memory_id.description: Row ID of the created memory. Present only when status is indexed.

action.description: Action taken: created (new memory) or duplicate (skipped due to existing name). Null on failure.
